mapper.select: select count(*) from TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS t where statistics_time >= trunc(sysdate)

select NAME, case when to_number(USED_CAPACITY) > 0 and to_number(USED_CAPACITY) < 0.01 then 0.01 else to_number(ROUND(USED_CAPACITY, 2)) end as usedCapacity, to_number(ROUND(BARE_CAPACITY, 2)) as bareCapacity, TABLE_COUNT as tableCount, LIVE_TABLE_ROTE as liveTableRote, TABLE_SUM as tableSum from TABLE_ORGANIZATION_DB_STATE
mapper.insert:
insert all
into TABLE_ORGANIZATION_DB_STATE( NAME, USED_CAPACITY, BARE_CAPACITY, TABLE_COUNT, LIVE_TABLE_ROTE, MODIFY_TIME, TABLE_SUM ) values ( #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.usedCapacity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bareCapacity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableCount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.liveTableRote,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate, #{item.tableSum,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: select t1.usedtablecount||'/'||t2.alltablecount as oneCount from ( select count(distinct TABLE_PROJECT||TABLE_NAME_EN ) as usedtablecount from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= trunc(sysdate) and livetype = 'LIVING' and upper(TABLE_TYPE) ='ODPS') t1 left join( select count(distinct TABLE_PROJECT||TABLE_NAME_EN ) as alltablecount from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= trunc(sysdate) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) ='ODPS' ) t2 on 1=1

select TABLETYPE,trunc(sum(DATABASE_COUNT)/100000000,2) as DATABASE_COUNT from (select case when TABLETYPE = 1 then 'ODPS' when TABLETYPE = 2 then 'ADS' when TABLETYPE = 3 then 'ADS' when TABLETYPE = 4 then 'HBASE' when TABLETYPE = 5 then 'HIVE' when TABLETYPE = 6 then 'ES' when TABLETYPE = 7 then 'CLICKHOUSE' when TABLETYPE = 10 then 'ORACLE' when TABLETYPE = 12 then 'CDH-HIVE' end as TABLETYPE, SUM(TABLEALLCOUNT) AS DATABASE_COUNT from( select TABLEPROJECT,tablename ,max(TABLEALLCOUNT) as TABLEALLCOUNT , TABLETYPE,max(PARTITIONDATE) from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL where TABLETYPE is not null group by TABLEPROJECT,tablename , TABLETYPE) t group by TABLETYPE ) where TABLETYPE is not null group by TABLETYPE ORDER BY TABLETYPE desc

select NAME, case when file_count is null then 0 when ROUND(file_count / 100000000, 2) > 0 and ROUND(file_count / 100000000, 2) < 0.01 then 0.01 else ROUND(file_count / 100000000, 2) end as FILECOUNT from t_ads_odps

select upper(SYS_NAME)as name, trunc(ceil(USE_SIZE)/1024,0) as USED_CAPACITY, trunc(ceil(TOTAL_SIZE)/1024,0) as BARE_CAPACITY from (select SYS_NAME,USE_SIZE,TOTAL_SIZE from SYNITIL.PANGU where upper(SYS_NAME) = 'ODPS' order by time desc) and rownum = 1 union all select upper(SYS_NAME)as name, trunc(ceil(USE_SIZE)/1024,0) as USED_CAPACITY, trunc(ceil(TOTAL_SIZE)/1024,0) as BARE_CAPACITY from (select SYS_NAME,USE_SIZE,TOTAL_SIZE from SYNITIL.PANGU where upper(SYS_NAME) = 'ADS' order by time desc) and rownum = 1

select t.name, case when t.USED_CAPACITY is null then 0 else t.USED_CAPACITY end as USED_CAPACITY, case when t.BARE_CAPACITY is null then 0 else t.BARE_CAPACITY end as BARE_CAPACITY from (select name, trunc(ceil(USED_CAPACITY), 2) as USED_CAPACITY, trunc(ceil(BARE_CAPACITY), 2) as BARE_CAPACITY, row_number() over(PARTITION BY upper(name) ORDER BY UT DESC) as rnn from t_ads_odps where upper(name) in ('ADS', 'ODPS', 'OSS', 'DATAHUB')) t where t.rnn = 1

select max(decode(type, 'dataQualityAllTablesSum', oneCount, 0)) as dataQualityAllTablesSum, max(decode(type, 'dataQualityAllColumnsSum', oneCount, 0)) as dataQualityAllColumnsSum, to_char(max(decode(type, 'liveTableRote', oneCount, 0)),'fm9990.09') as liveTableRote, max(decode(type, 'abnormalModelsSum', oneCount, 0)) as abnormalModelsSum, max(decode(type, 'dataAbnormalTablesSum', oneCount, 0)) as dataAbnormalTablesSum, max(decode(type, 'nationalStandardTablesSum', oneCount, 0)) as nationalStandardTablesSum, max(decode(type, 'delayTablesSum', oneCount, 0)) as delayTablesSum, max(decode(type, 'abnormalDataFlowsSum', oneCount, 0)) as abnormalDataFlowsSum, max(decode(type, 'abnormalBillsSum', oneCount, 0)) as abnormalBillsSum, max(decode(type, 'landMarkTablesSum', oneCount, 0)) as landMarkTablesSum from ( select 'dataQualityAllTablesSum' as type, count(*) as oneCount from dqc_task_config union all select 'dataQualityAllColumnsSum' as type , count(*) as oneCount from dqc_rule_info union ALL select 'liveTableRote' as type,case when t2.alltablecount = 0 then 0 else round(t1.usedtablecount/t2.alltablecount,4)*100 end as oneCount from ( select count(distinct TABLE_PROJECT||TABLE_NAME_EN ) as usedtablecount from table_organization_assets where STATISTICS_TIME >= to_char(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) and STATISTICS_TIME < to_char(sysdate + 1 - #{daysAgo}) and livetype = 'LIVING') t1 left join( select count(distinct TABLE_PROJECT||TABLE_NAME_EN ) as alltablecount from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= trunc(sysdate) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) ='ODPS') t2 on 1=1 union ALL
-- select 'abnormalModelsSum' as type, count(TASK_ID) as oneCount from ( -- select * from ( -- select row_number() over (partition by odps_PROJECT_NAME,node_Name order by CYC_TIME desc )rn,TASK_ID,status -- from m_flow_three where prg_TYPE = 98) where status = 5 and rn = 1) -- 改为只判断 工作流监控页面 状态为运行失败的数量 select 'abnormalModelsSum' as type, count(status) as oneCount from m_business_instance where status = '运行失败'
and project_name in
lower(#{item})
-- select 'abnormalModelsSum' as type, count(INSTANCE_ID) as oneCount from ( -- select * from( -- select row_number() over (partition by PROJECT_NAME,node_Name order by CYCLE_TIME desc -- )rn,INSTANCE_ID,status -- from M_FLOW where NODE_TYPE = 98 ) where rn =1 and status = 5) -- 改为只判断 工作流监控页面 状态为运行失败的数量 select 'abnormalModelsSum' as type, count(status) as oneCount from m_business_instance where status = '运行失败'
and project_name in
lower(#{item})
union ALL select 'nationalStandardTablesSum' as type , count(codeid) as oneCount from SYNLTE.FIELDCODE where deleted = 0 union ALL select 'landMarkTablesSum' as type , count(distinct t.dmzd) as oneCount from dd_bddm t )

select "name",sum(tableSum) as tableSum from ( select upper(table_type) as "name", count(*) as tableSum from table_organization_assets where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) and table_type is not null group by table_type ) group by "name"
mapper.insert:
merge into DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE a using (select #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as PROJECT_NAME, #{item.tableNameEN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as TABLENAME_EN, #{item.dataSourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as DATA_SOURCE_ID from dual) b on(a.PROJECT_NAME = b.PROJECT_NAME and a.TABLENAME_EN = b.TABLENAME_EN and a.DATA_SOURCE_ID = b.DATA_SOURCE_ID) when matched then update set a.TABLENAME_CH = #{item.tableNameCH,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, a.ISSTANDARD = #{item.isStandard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
a.ISADDMONITOR = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
a.ISDELETE = #{item.isDelete,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert (DATABASE_TYPE,PROJECT_NAME,TABLENAME_EN,TABLENAME_CH, TABLE_ID,PARTITIONED,DATA_SOURCE_NAME,DATA_SOURCE_ID,DATA_CENTER_NAME, DATA_CENTER_ID,ISSTANDARD,ISADDMONITOR,ISDELETE,PARTITION_COLUMN) values ( #{item.dataBaseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableNameEN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.tableNameCH,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableUuid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.partitioned,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dataSourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.dataSourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dataCenterName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.dataCenterId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isStandard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{item.isAddMonitor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{item.isDelete,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.partitionColumn,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: select DATABASE_TYPE as dataBaseType , PROJECT_NAME as projectName , TABLENAME_EN as tableNameEN , TABLENAME_CH as tableNameCH,PARTITIONED as partitioned,DATA_SOURCE_NAME as dataSourceName, DATA_SOURCE_ID as dataSourceId,DATA_CENTER_NAME as dataCenterName,DATA_CENTER_ID as dataCenterId, ISSTANDARD as isStandard,ISADDMONITOR as isAddMonitor,ISDELETE as isDelete, PARTITION_COLUMN as partitionColumn ,table_id as tableUuid from DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE where ISDELETE = '0' and ISADDMONITOR = '已控'

select DATABASE_TYPE as dataBaseType , PROJECT_NAME as projectName , TABLENAME_EN as tableNameEN , TABLENAME_CH as tableNameCH,PARTITIONED as partitioned,DATA_SOURCE_NAME as dataSourceName, DATA_SOURCE_ID as dataSourceId,DATA_CENTER_NAME as dataCenterName,DATA_CENTER_ID as dataCenterId, ISSTANDARD as isStandard,ISADDMONITOR as isAddMonitor,ISDELETE as isDelete, PARTITION_COLUMN as partitionColumn ,table_id as tableUuid from DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE where ISADDMONITOR = '待控' and ISSTANDARD = '0'

select distinct (project_name || '.' || tablename_en) as tableNameEn,tablename_ch as tableNameCh, case when table_today_sum is null then 0 else table_today_sum end as tableTodaySum, case when table_all_sum is null then 0 else table_all_sum end as tableAllSum from DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE t1 left join (select a.table_project, a.TABLE_NAME_EN, case when a.table_today_sum - b.table_today_sum < 0 then 0 else a.table_today_sum - b.table_today_sum end as table_today_sum, a.table_all_sum from (select * from DATA_STORAGE_TABLE_full where substr(statistic_day, 0, 8) = #{dt}) a left join (select table_project,TABLE_NAME_EN,table_today_sum,table_all_sum from DATA_STORAGE_TABLE_full where substr(statistic_day, 0, 8) = #{yesToday}) b on a.TABLE_NAME_EN = b.TABLE_NAME_EN) t2 on upper(t1.project_name) = upper(t2.table_project) and upper(t1.tablename_en) = upper(t2.TABLE_NAME_EN) where t1.ISDELETE = '0' and t1.ISADDMONITOR = '已控'

select case when a.value is null then 'null' else a.value end as value, case when b.label is null then a.label||'(0)' else b.label end as label from (
select distinct CODEID as value ,CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'JZCODEGASJZZFL'
select distinct CODEVALID as value, VALTEXT as label from SYNLTE.FIELDCODEVAL WHERE upper(CODEID)=upper('GACODE000404')
) a full join ( SELECT
PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as value
PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as value
FROM ( SELECT
j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
j.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) and j.table_type is not null) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 group by
PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
) b on a.label = b.value order by value

select.if:
select case when a.value is null then 'null' else a.value end as value, case when a.label is null then '未知(0)' when b.label is null then a.label||'(0)' else b.label end as label from ( select distinct c.CODEID as value ,c.CODETEXT as label,d.primaryLabel from V_CLASSIFY_INFO c right join (select distinct CODEID, CODETEXT as primaryLabel from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where CODEID = #{primaryClassifyCode} and PARCODEID is not null )d on c.PARCODEID = d.CODEID order by value) a left join
(SELECT
SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as value, PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryLabel
SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as value, PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryLabel
FROM ( SELECT
j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
j.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,j.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo})) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 group by
SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
) b
(SELECT
THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH as value, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryLabel
SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as value, PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryLabel
FROM ( SELECT
j.THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH,j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
j.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,j.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo})) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 group by
THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH,SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH
) b
on a.label = b.value and a.primaryLabel = b.primaryLabel

if.if: SELECT '未知' || '(' || count(1) || ')' AS label, '' AS VALUE FROM (SELECT j.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH, j.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH, row_number() over(PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) AS rnn FROM table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate)) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH = '未知' GROUP BY SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH, PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH

SELECT '未知' || '(' || count(1) || ')' AS label, '' AS VALUE FROM (SELECT j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, row_number() over(PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) AS rnn FROM table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate)) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '未知' GROUP BY SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH

select.if:
select primaryClassifyCh,decode(grouping(secondaryClassifyCh)+grouping(primaryClassifyCh),1,'汇总',2,'合计',secondaryClassifyCh) secondaryClassifyCh , sum(tableAllSum) tableAllSum,sum(tableAllSize) tableAllSize, sum(averageAllDailyVolume) averageAllDailyVolume,sum(tableNumberSum) tableNumberSum, sum(yesterdayAllSum) yesterdayAllSum, sum(adsSum) adsSum, sum(odpsSum) odpsSum, sum(adsSize) adsSize, sum(odpsSize) odpsSize, sum(averageAllDailySize) averageAllDailySize from( select mainClassify,nvl(primaryClassifyCh,'未知') primaryClassifyCh, nvl(secondaryClassifyCh,'未知') secondaryClassifyCh , tableAllSum ,tableAllSize , averageAllDailyVolume ,tableNumberSum ,yesterdayAllSum,Statistics_Day ,todayStr , adsSum, odpsSum, adsSize, odpsSize, averageAllDailySize from( select 'dataResourceClassify' as mainClassify , FACTOR_ONE_NAME as primaryClassifyCh , FACTOR_TWO_NAME as secondaryClassifyCh , sum(table_all_count) as tableAllSum , TRUNC(sum(table_size)/1073741824,4) as tableAllSize,sum(YESTERDAY_COUNT) as yesterdayAllSum, sum(AVERAGE_DAILY_VOLUME)/count(*) as averageAllDailyVolume, count(*) as tableNumberSum ,to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') as Statistics_Day , to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd') as todayStr, sum(case when upper(table_type)='ADS' then table_all_count else 0 end) adsSum, sum(case when upper(table_type)='ODPS' then table_all_count else 0 end) odpsSum, TRUNC(sum(case when upper(table_type)='ADS' then table_size else 0 end) / 1073741824, 4) adsSize, TRUNC(sum(case when upper(table_type)='ODPS' then table_size else 0 end) / 1073741824, 4) odpsSize, -- TRUNC((sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*))/1073741824,4) averageAllDailySize -- 改为当日增量小于0.01时取0.01 case when (sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*)) is null then 0 when (sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*)) / 1073741824 > 0 and (sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*)) / 1073741824 < 0.01 then 0.01 else TRUNC((sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*)) / 1073741824, 2) end as averageAllDailySize from ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate)) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 )
FACTOR_ONE_NAME= #{primaryClassifyCh}
and FACTOR_TWO_NAME = #{secondaryClassifyCh}
and FACTOR_ONE_NAME is null
and FACTOR_TWO_NAME is null
group by FACTOR_ONE_NAME ,FACTOR_TWO_NAME ,to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') )) group by rollup(primaryClassifyCh,secondaryClassifyCh) having grouping_id(primaryClassifyCh,secondaryClassifyCh) <= 1 and concat(primaryClassifyCh,secondaryClassifyCh)!='未知' and primaryClassifyCh is not null and decode(grouping(secondaryClassifyCh)+grouping(primaryClassifyCh),1,'汇总',2,'合计',secondaryClassifyCh) is not null
and grouping(secondaryClassifyCh)+grouping(primaryClassifyCh)=1

select primaryClassifyCh,decode(grouping(secondaryClassifyCh)+grouping(primaryClassifyCh),1,'汇总',2,'合计',secondaryClassifyCh) secondaryClassifyCh , sum(tableAllSum) tableAllSum,sum(tableAllSize) tableAllSize, sum(averageAllDailyVolume) averageAllDailyVolume,sum(tableNumberSum) tableNumberSum,sum(yesterdayAllSum) yesterdayAllSum, sum(adsSum) adsSum, sum(odpsSum) odpsSum, sum(adsSize) adsSize, sum(odpsSize) odpsSize, sum(averageAllDailySize) averageAllDailySize from( select mainClassify,nvl(primaryClassifyCh,'未知') primaryClassifyCh, nvl(secondaryClassifyCh,'未知') secondaryClassifyCh , tableAllSum ,tableAllSize , averageAllDailyVolume ,tableNumberSum ,Statistics_Day,yesterdayAllSum ,todayStr , adsSum, odpsSum, adsSize, odpsSize, averageAllDailySize from( select 'null' as mainClassify , FACTOR_ONE_NAME as primaryClassifyCh , FACTOR_TWO_NAME as secondaryClassifyCh , sum(table_all_count) as tableAllSum , TRUNC(sum(table_size)/1073741824,4) as tableAllSize,sum(AVERAGE_DAILY_VOLUME)/count(*) as averageAllDailyVolume, count(*) as tableNumberSum ,to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') as Statistics_Day , to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd') as todayStr,sum(YESTERDAY_COUNT) as yesterdayAllSum, sum(case when upper(table_type)='ADS' then table_all_count else 0 end) adsSum, sum(case when upper(table_type)='ODPS' then table_all_count else 0 end) odpsSum, TRUNC(sum(case when upper(table_type)='ADS' then table_size else 0 end) / 1073741824, 4) adsSize, TRUNC(sum(case when upper(table_type)='ODPS' then table_size else 0 end) / 1073741824, 4) odpsSize, -- sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*) averageAllDailySize -- 改为当日增量小于0.01时取0.01 case when (sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*)) is null then 0 when (sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*)) / 1073741824 > 0 and (sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*)) / 1073741824 < 0.01 then 0.01 else TRUNC((sum(case when AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE is null then 0 else AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE end) / count(*)) / 1073741824, 2) end as averageAllDailySize from table_organization_assets
STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate) and (PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH is null or PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '未知' )and (SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH is null or SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '未知') and (PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH is null or PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH = '未知' ) and (SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH is null or SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH = '未知') and FACTOR_ONE_NAME is null and FACTOR_TWO_NAME is null
group by FACTOR_ONE_NAME ,FACTOR_TWO_NAME ,to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') ) ) group by rollup(primaryClassifyCh,secondaryClassifyCh) having grouping_id(primaryClassifyCh,secondaryClassifyCh) <= 1 and concat(primaryClassifyCh,secondaryClassifyCh)!='未知' and primaryClassifyCh is not null and decode(grouping(secondaryClassifyCh)+grouping(primaryClassifyCh),1,'汇总',2,'合计',secondaryClassifyCh) is not null

mapper.select: select distinct TABLE_TYPE || '->' || RES_NAME || '->' || TABLE_PROJECT as tableProject, update_period as updatePeriod, '' as productStage from (SELECT * FROM (SELECT j.*, row_number() over(PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo})) a ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1

select.if: select case when PRIMARY_NAME is NULL THEN '未知' else PRIMARY_NAME end as PRIMARY_NAME, records , tableSize from( select row_number() over ( partition by PRIMARY_NAME order by STATISTICS_day desc ) rn ,t.* from( select PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH AS PRIMARY_NAME,TRUNC(sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT)/100000000,6) as records , TRUNC(sum(table_size)/1073741824,4) as tableSize,to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') as STATISTICS_day from table_organization_assets where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) group by PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH , to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') ) t where t.PRIMARY_NAME is not null) where rn =1

select case when PRIMARY_NAME is NULL THEN '未知' else PRIMARY_NAME end as PRIMARY_NAME , records , tableSize from( select row_number() over ( partition by PRIMARY_NAME order by STATISTICS_day desc ) rn ,t.* from( select PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH AS PRIMARY_NAME,TRUNC(sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT)/100000000,6) as records , TRUNC(sum(table_size)/1073741824,4) as tableSize,to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') as STATISTICS_day from table_organization_assets where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) group by PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH , to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') ) t where t.PRIMARY_NAME is not null) where rn =1

select case when PRIMARY_NAME is NULL THEN '未知' else PRIMARY_NAME end as PRIMARY_NAME , records , tableSize from( select row_number() over ( partition by PRIMARY_NAME order by STATISTICS_day desc ) rn ,t.* from( select FACTOR_ONE_NAME AS PRIMARY_NAME,TRUNC(sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT)/100000000,6) as records , TRUNC(sum(table_size)/1073741824,4) as tableSize,to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') as STATISTICS_day from table_organization_assets where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) group by FACTOR_ONE_NAME , to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') ) t where t.PRIMARY_NAME is not null) where rn =1

mapper.select: select distinct lower(project_name) from DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE

select DATABASE_TYPE as dataBaseType , PROJECT_NAME as projectName , TABLENAME_EN as tableNameEN , TABLENAME_CH as tableNameCH,PARTITIONED as partitioned,DATA_SOURCE_NAME as dataSourceName, DATA_SOURCE_ID as dataSourceId,DATA_CENTER_NAME as dataCenterName,DATA_CENTER_ID as dataCenterId, ISSTANDARD as isStandard,ISADDMONITOR as isAddMonitor,ISDELETE as isDelete, PARTITION_COLUMN as partitionColumn ,TABLE_ID AS tableUuid from DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE
ISDELETE = '0' and ISADDMONITOR = '已控'
and UPPER(DATABASE_TYPE) = upper(#{dataBaseType})
and (upper(TABLENAME_EN) LIKE upper('%'||#{tableName}||'%') or upper(TABLENAME_CH) LIKE upper('%'||#{tableName}||'%') or upper(PROJECT_NAME) LIKE upper('%'||#{tableName}||'%'))
SELECT DISTINCT TABLENAME,OBJECTNAME FROM synlte."OBJECT"
mapper.update:
update DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE set ISADDMONITOR = '待控' where
(UPPER(DATA_SOURCE_ID) = UPPER(#{item.dataSourceId}) and UPPER(PROJECT_NAME) = UPPER(#{item.projectName}) and UPPER(TABLENAME_EN) = UPPER(#{item.tableNameEN}))
mapper.select: select lower(TABLE_PROJECT) as value,lower(TABLE_PROJECT)||'('||count(1)||')' as label from (SELECT TABLE_TYPE,TABLE_PROJECT FROM ( SELECT j.TABLE_TYPE,j.TABLE_PROJECT, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate)) h WHERE h.rnn = 1) where upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{stroageLocation}) group by upper(TABLE_TYPE),lower(TABLE_PROJECT) order by lower(TABLE_PROJECT)

SELECT TABLE_TYPE||'('||count(1)||')' as label,TABLE_TYPE as value FROM ( SELECT upper(j.TABLE_TYPE) as TABLE_TYPE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate) and j.table_type is not null) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 group by TABLE_TYPE

select a.label||'('|| sum(case when b.table_name_en is not null then 1 else 0 end) ||')' as label ,a.value as value from (select labelname as label,substr(labelcode,0,1) as value from SYNLTE.LABELS group by labelname,substr(labelcode,0,1)) a left join (select labels,TABLE_NAME_EN from (SELECT j.labels,j.TABLE_NAME_EN, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1) b on b.labels like '%'||a.value||'%' GROUP BY a.value,a.label ORDER BY value

select '启用' as value, '启用('||count(1)||')' as label FROM ( SELECT j.OBJECT_STATE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and OBJECT_STATE in('0','1') union select '停用' as value, '停用('||count(1)||')' as label FROM ( SELECT j.OBJECT_STATE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and (OBJECT_STATE = '-1' or OBJECT_STATE is null ) union select '已注册' as value, '已注册('||count(1)||')' as label FROM ( SELECT j.REGISTER_STATE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo})) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and REGISTER_STATE = '1' union select '未注册' as value, '未注册('||count(1)||')' as label FROM ( SELECT j.REGISTER_STATE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo})) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and (REGISTER_STATE != '1' or REGISTER_STATE is null )
select upper(TABLE_TYPE) from TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) group by upper(TABLE_TYPE)

select SJXJBM as tableId,TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn,OBJECT_ID as objectId,APPROVAL_ID as approvalId, APPROVAL_STATUS as approvalStatus,APPROVAL_CREATE_TIME as approvalCreateTime,APPROVAL_UPDATE_TIME as approvalUpdateTime from DATA_REGISTER where APPROVAL_STATUS = '2'

select APPROVAL_ID as approvalId, case when STATUS = '3' then '3' when STATUS = '4' then '-1' ELSE '2' end as approvalStatus from DGN_APPROVAL where STATUS in ('1','2','3','4') and
APPROVAL_ID = #{item.approvalId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select distinct SJXJBM as tableid, case when DATARESOURCE_CODE is null then #{resourceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} else DATARESOURCE_CODE end as symbol from ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower( TABLE_PROJECT ), upper( TABLE_NAME_EN ) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) AS rnn FROM table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and (
h.SJXJBM = #{tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

select case when STATUS = '3' then 3 when STATUS = '4' then -1 ELSE 2 end as approvalStatus from DGN_APPROVAL where APPROVAL_ID in( select APPROVAL_ID from data_register where SJXJBM = #{tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
select OBJECTNAME from SYNLTE."OBJECT" where RELATE_TABLENAME = 'OBJECTFIELD' and upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and rownum=1
select upper(TABLENAME) as TABLENAME,OBJECTNAME from SYNLTE."OBJECT"

select.if:
select * from( select '' as primaryClassifyId, t1.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryClassifyCh, '' AS secondaryClassifyId, t1.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 '' as threeClassifyId, t1.THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH as threeClassifyCh, t1.SJXJBM || '_' || TABLE_TYPE || '_' || RES_NAME || '_' || TABLE_PROJECT as tableId, -- 表id t1.TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 t1.NAME aS tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 t1.STATISTICS_TIME AS INSERT_DATE from( select * FROM ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) and PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH!='未知' and SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH!='未知' ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 ) t1)
where (primaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%' or secondaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(tableNameCh) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableNameEn) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableId) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))

select * from( select '' as primaryClassifyId, t1.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryClassifyCh, '' AS secondaryClassifyId, t1.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 t1.SJXJBM || '_' || TABLE_TYPE || '_' || RES_NAME || '_' || TABLE_PROJECT as tableId, -- 表id t1.TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 t1.NAME aS tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 t1.STATISTICS_TIME AS INSERT_DATE from( select * FROM ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) and PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH!='未知' and SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH!='未知') h WHERE h.rnn = 1 ) t1)
where (primaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%' or secondaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(tableNameCh) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableNameEn) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableId) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))

select SJYJFL as primaryClassifyId, --- 一级分类代码 PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as primaryClassifyCh, --- 一级分类中文 SJEJFL as secondaryClassifyId, -- 二级分类代码 case when SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH is null then '未知' else SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH end as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 SJXJBM as tableId, -- 表id TABLENAME as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 NAME as tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 INSERT_DATE from classify_interface_all_date where PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
and (PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH like '%'||#{name}||'%' or SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(NAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(TABLENAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(SJXJBM) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))
GROUP BY SJYJFL,PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH,SJEJFL,SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH,SJXJBM,TABLENAME,NAME,INSERT_DATE order by INSERT_DATE desc

select SJLYYJ as primaryClassifyId, --- 一级分类代码 PRIMARYDATASOURCECH as primaryClassifyCh, --- 一级分类中文 SJLYEJ as secondaryClassifyId, -- 二级分类代码 case when SECONDARYDATASOURCECH is null then '未知' else SECONDARYDATASOURCECH end as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 SJXJBM as tableId, -- 表id TABLENAME as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 NAME as tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 INSERT_DATE from classify_interface_all_date where PRIMARYDATASOURCECH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
and (PRIMARYDATASOURCECH like '%'||#{name}||'%' or SECONDARYDATASOURCECH like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(NAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(TABLENAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(SJXJBM) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))
GROUP BY SJLYYJ,PRIMARYDATASOURCECH,SJLYEJ,SECONDARYDATASOURCECH,SJXJBM,TABLENAME,NAME,INSERT_DATE order by INSERT_DATE desc

mapper.update: merge into ZC_CONFIG_FIELD_CONTROL a using (select 'TABLE_ORGANIZATION' as NAME, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as USERNAME FROM dual) b on (a.name = b.name and a.USERNAME = b.USERNAME) when matched then update set SHOW_FIELD_LIST = #{tableOrganizationShowFields,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where NAME = 'TABLE_ORGANIZATION' and USERNAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert values('TABLE_ORGANIZATION',90,#{tableOrganizationShowFields,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select SHOW_FIELD_LIST from ZC_CONFIG_FIELD_CONTROL where NAME='TABLE_ORGANIZATION' and USERNAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
